explicit_text: I was born in a little town called Meherrin, Virginia, and so was my father, Hester Linwood Clark. entity: One Has My Name (The Other Has My Heart)
explicit_text: The first song I performed on television when I was about 15 was 'One Has My Name (The Other Has My Heart).' It was a hugely popular song at the time, about infidelity, which I found ironic given my age. I chose it because everyone knew and liked it, and it helped me fit in with the audience.
